mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_disaster_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY insp_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_disaster_inspection WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_disaster_inspection WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_disaster_inspection (insp_date, facility_name, fac_type, location, checker, content, anomaly, action_taken, done_status, next_check, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{inspDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{facilityName}, #{facType}, #{location}, #{checker}, #{content}, #{anomaly}, #{actionTaken}, #{doneStatus}, #{nextCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_disaster_inspection SET insp_date = #{inspDate,jdbcType=DATE}, facility_name = #{facilityName}, fac_type = #{facType}, location = #{location}, checker = #{checker}, content = #{content}, anomaly = #{anomaly}, action_taken = #{actionTaken}, done_status = #{doneStatus}, next_check = #{nextCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_disaster_inspection SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
